channel.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Mar 2nd, 2022
item.description:
🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

PowerShell

  • PSSlackstars253 - PowerShell module for simple Slack integration.

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Oct 15th, 2021
item.description:
🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

Python

  • slashbotstars16 - An easy way to create slash commands using AWS Lambda functions

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Oct 13th, 2021
item.description:
🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

Java

  • java-slack-sdkstars477 - Slack's official Java framework for building Slack apps

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    Python

  • blockkitstars46 - A fast way to build Block Kit interfaces in Python
  • slackblocksstars36 - Python API for building Slack Block Kit messages
  • slack-php-apistars184 - PHP Slack client based on the official OpenAPI specification
  • bolt-pythonstars629 - Slack's official Python framework for building Slack apps
  • python-slack-events-apistars304 - Slack Events API adapter for Python
  • python-slack-sdkstars3.5k - Slack's official SDK for Python

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    Ruby

  • slack-ruby-block-kitstars43 - A ruby wrapper for Slack's Block Kit
  • slack-ruby-bot-serverstars243 - Ruby library for building Slack applications

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    Rust

  • slack-morphism-ruststars47 - A modern async Slack API client for Rust

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    Swift

  • SwiftBlocksUIstars53 - Interactive Slack messages and modals using a SwiftUI-like declarative style

    • ⚙️   Open-Source Slack Apps and Integrations

    Java

  • tasks-appstars54 - Simple task management app produced by Slack
  • simple-slack-apistars471 - A Slack client library in Java

    • ⚙️   Open-Source Slack Apps and Integrations

    JavaScript/Typescript

  • definition-appstars18 - App for storing and accessing company-specific phrases
  • slack-github-actionstars383 - Send data into Slack using this GitHub Action
  • slack-reporting-toolstars10 - App that allows team members to report offensive messages
  • tasks-appstars54 - Simple task management app produced by Slack
  • tesla-slackstars27 - Track your Tesla from Slack

    • ⚙️   Open-Source Slack Apps and Integrations

    Python

  • tasks-appstars54 - Simple task management app produced by Slack
  • slackbotstars1.2k - A chat bot for Slack
  • slacker-clistars177 - Messages to slack from the command line
  • wee-slackstars2.4k - A WeeChat plugin for Slack

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    C#

  • margiebotstars123 - A .NET library designed to make building bots for Slack fast, easy, and fun
  • Slack.Webhooksstars166 - A library to work with Slack webhooks more easily
  • SlackAPIstars424 - A third-party implementation of Slack's API written in C#

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    JavaScript/TypeScript

  • bolt-jsstars2.3k - Slack's official JavaScript framework for building Slack apps
  • jsx-slackstars314 - Build JSON object for Slack Block Kit surfaces from JSX
  • node-slack-sdkstars3.1k - Slack's official SDK for Node.js
  • slack-block-builderstars348 - Lightweight Node.js library for building Slack Block Kit UIs, with a declarative syntax inspired by SwiftUI

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    PHP

  • SlackBundlestars39 - SlackBundle for Symfony2
  • slack-php-app-frameworkstars30 - Robust PHP framework for building Slack apps in PHP
  • slack-php-block-kitstars30 - Fluent interface for composing Slack Block Kit messages and modals in PHP
  • slack-php-socket-modestars6 - A Socket Mode implementation for slack-php-app-frameworkstars30
  • slack-php-slickstars4 - Dependency-free micro-framework for building Slack apps in PHP

    • ⚙️   Open-Source Slack Apps and Integrations

    CoffeeScript

  • jinorastars87 - Slack webhook app to create anonymous public channels

    • ⚙️   Open-Source Slack Apps and Integrations

    PHP

  • MantisBT-Slackstars48 - MantisBT plugin to send bug updates to Slack
  • monologstars19.9k - Sends your logs to Slack

    • ⚙️   Open-Source Slack Apps and Integrations

    Ruby

  • slack-gamebotstars129 - A game bot for Slack
  • snarkovstars27 - Sinatra-based Markov bot for Slack
  • tickbotstars11 - Simple team time tracking reminder
  • trebekbotstars153 - A Jeopardy! bot for Slack

    • 🎨   Themes

  • Slack Themes - A Slack sidebar theme browser
  • Sweet Themes Are Made of These - Website for sharing Slack custom palettes

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Aug 30th, 2015
item.description:
🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

Ruby

  • slack-ruby-botstars49 - The easiest way to write a Slack bot in Ruby
  • slack-ruby-clientstars16 - A Ruby client for the Slack Web and RealTime Messaging APIs

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Jun 10th, 2015
item.description:
🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

Python

  • django-slack-oauthstars51 - Slack OAuth module for Django

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    Scala

  • slack-scala-clientstars183 - A Scala Slack client for the Web and RTM API

item.title: matiassingers/awesome-slack Mar 18th, 2015
item.description:
🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

Erlang

  • slacker - Erlang Slack REST API wrapper

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    Go

  • webhookstars8.3k - Easily run commands in response to HTTP webhook requests from Slack

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    Java

  • simple-slack-apistars471 - A Slack client library in Java

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    Python

  • django-slackstars228 - Slack integration for Django, using the templating engine to generate messages
  • slacker-clistars177 - Messages to slack from the command line

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    R

  • slackrstars292 - A package to send webhook API messages to Slack channels/users from R

    • 🛠️   Libraries and SDKs

    Ruby

  • slack-notifierstars1.5k - A simple wrapper for posting to Slack
  • slack-notifystars94 - Send notifications to Slack
  • slack-posterstars53 - Simple gem to post messages on Slack using webhooks
